query: /infrastructure-coder terraform Create an AWS VPC module with public and private subnets across 3 AZs, NAT gateway, and route tables
expected_behavior: Agent generates main.tf with VPC, subnets, NAT gateway, route tables
Agent generates variables.tf with typed inputs (vpc_cidr, availability_zones, environment)
Agent generates outputs.tf with vpc_id, subnet_ids
Agent generates versions.tf with pinned AWS provider (~> 5.0)
Agent uses for_each for subnets (not count)
Agent tags all resources with Name, Environment, ManagedBy
